query:
UPDATE users SET 
                username = $2,
                phone = $3,
                phone_hash = $4,
                email = $5,
                status_text = $6,
                two_fa_enabled = $7,
                two_fa_secret = $8,
                is_active = $9,
                last_seen_at = $10,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
